title: amsonia tomentosa var. tomentosa
intro: Amsonia tomentosa var. tomentosa, also known as hairy bluestem or woolly bluestem, is a perennial plant species within the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its ability to stimulate the production of bile and improve digestion. The health benefits of Amsonia tomentosa var. tomentosa include its potential to treat various gastrointestinal issues, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Herbal preparations of the plant's roots and stems can be used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
